evals.prompt: 检查 https://github.com/motse-ai/gke-agent-manager/pull/12 是否可以结束 LUC-123。
evals.expected_output: Uses gh to inspect PR state, checks, reviews, reviewer-bot output, and unresolved threads; refuses closure if any gate is missing; records GITHUB_PR_WORKFLOW activity in LLM-know-how-wiki.

evals.prompt: 为当前 LUC-123 分支创建 PR。
evals.expected_output: Creates a PR against dev with title [LUC-123] <Linear issue title>, includes the Linear link, records the PR URL in the wiki, and instructs the Linear workflow to move the issue to In Review and comment with the PR URL.
